//: Off Grid Console — jscpd (copy/paste detector) config. Mechanically enforces CLAUDE.md hygiene §C DRY ('duplicated logic that drifts is a defect'). Mirrors the dependency-cruiser adoption: config + scripts + pre-push + CI + an honest, ratcheting baseline. See docs/GAPS_BACKLOG.md (G-CPD-*) for the clone burn-down list.
//min: Detection floor tuned to flag real shared logic, not trivial boilerplate. 8 lines / 70 tokens is jscpd's sensible mid-range: below this you catch import blocks, prop-type lists and JSX scaffolding (noise); above it you miss genuinely duplicated helpers.
//reporters: console for the pre-push/CI gate signal, json for machine-readable stats, html for the founder-facing report.
//threshold: Baseline-then-ratchet: set at or JUST ABOVE the current REAL duplication % so hygiene can only improve, never regress. NOT zero (that would fail immediately on an existing codebase). BASELINE 2026-07-10 = 2.08% duplicated lines (2.57% tokens; 256 clones over 1152 files). Set to 2.5 — a small margin above 2.08% so incidental reformatting doesn't false-trip, while any new duplicated helper pushes over and blocks. Ratchet this DOWN as G-CPD-* clones are extracted (see docs/GAPS_BACKLOG.md).
